mapper.select: SELECT e.id, e.deptment_id, e.regist_level_id, e.realname, e.delmark, d.dept_name, r.regist_name FROM employee e LEFT JOIN department d ON e.deptment_id = d.id LEFT JOIN regist_level r ON e.regist_level_id = r.id WHERE e.deptment_id = #{deptmentId} AND e.delmark = 0 ORDER BY e.id

SELECT e.id, e.deptment_id, e.regist_level_id, e.realname, e.delmark, d.dept_name, r.regist_name FROM employee e LEFT JOIN department d ON e.deptment_id = d.id LEFT JOIN regist_level r ON e.regist_level_id = r.id WHERE e.deptment_id = #{deptmentId} AND e.delmark = 0 ORDER BY r.sequence_no DESC NULLS LAST, e.id

SELECT e.id, e.deptment_id, e.regist_level_id, e.realname, e.delmark, d.dept_name, r.regist_name FROM employee e LEFT JOIN department d ON e.deptment_id = d.id LEFT JOIN regist_level r ON e.regist_level_id = r.id WHERE e.deptment_id = #{deptmentId} AND e.regist_level_id = #{registLevelId} AND e.delmark = 0 ORDER BY e.id

SELECT e.id, e.deptment_id, e.regist_level_id, e.realname, e.clinic_room, e.delmark, d.dept_name, r.regist_name FROM employee e LEFT JOIN department d ON e.deptment_id = d.id LEFT JOIN regist_level r ON e.regist_level_id = r.id WHERE e.id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO employee (deptment_id, regist_level_id, realname, password, delmark) VALUES (#{deptmentId}, #{registLevelId}, #{realname}, 'dev-password', COALESCE(#{delmark}, 0))
mapper.update: UPDATE employee SET delmark = #{delmark} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM employee e WHERE e.deptment_id BETWEEN 1 AND 20
AND e.delmark = 0
AND e.deptment_id = #{departmentId}
AND e.realname ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')

SELECT e.id, e.deptment_id AS deptmentId, d.dept_name AS deptName, e.regist_level_id AS registLevelId, r.regist_name AS registName, e.realname, e.delmark, u.id AS userId, u.username, u.status AS accountStatus FROM employee e LEFT JOIN department d ON d.id = e.deptment_id LEFT JOIN regist_level r ON r.id = e.regist_level_id LEFT JOIN users u ON u.employee_id = e.id WHERE e.deptment_id BETWEEN 1 AND 20
AND e.delmark = 0
AND e.deptment_id = #{departmentId}
AND e.realname ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
ORDER BY e.deptment_id, e.id

SELECT e.id, e.deptment_id AS deptmentId, d.dept_name AS deptName, e.regist_level_id AS registLevelId, r.regist_name AS registName, e.realname, e.delmark, u.id AS userId, u.username, u.status AS accountStatus FROM employee e LEFT JOIN department d ON d.id = e.deptment_id LEFT JOIN regist_level r ON r.id = e.regist_level_id LEFT JOIN users u ON u.employee_id = e.id WHERE e.id = #{id} AND e.deptment_id BETWEEN 1 AND 20
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM register WHERE employee_id = #{employeeId} AND visit_state IN (1, 2, 6)
